text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many seasons have passed since Vodka and
Daiwa Scarlet's initial springtime showdown. And
now, they'll settle the score today at the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Are you sucking up to me all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No way. I'm just sayin' that since you're now
number one, there's more meaning in beatin' ya.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show ya there's a better way to live
than bein' number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You're not going to show me anything.
You're not going to win, after all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, confident as ever. You haven't changed a
bit since we met.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The same goes for you. But I'm glad we're both
just as stubborn.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If one of us were weak and docile... they would
just drag the other one down.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Both of us would be finished. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. It's because neither of us gave in
that we're here today.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha, we're both hopeless. Hopeless, but
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the race begins—a competition between
two Umamusume who'll never give the other even
an inch.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! I can't be number one if I don't beat
you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna beat you while you're number one and
become the coolest in history!
